ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core sample */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the core sample belongs to */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the core sample was collected */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the core sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the core sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who collected the sample */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the collection site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the core sample */,
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of core sample (e.g., lake sediments, ocean sediments) */,
  "core_sample_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the core sample (e.g., collected, processed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_core_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_core_samples_sample_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type_id") REFERENCES sample_types ("sample_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_core_samples_core_sample_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("core_sample_status_id") REFERENCES core_sample_status ("core_sample_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "sample_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_sample_status" (
  "core_sample_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core sample status */,
  "core_sample_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the core sample status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the core sample status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_sample_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core sample the layer belongs to */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the layer (cm) */,
  "depth_bot" REAL /* Bottom depth of the layer (mm) */,
  "depth_top" REAL /* Top depth of the layer (mm) */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the layer (mm) */,
  "age14C" INTEGER /* Age of the layer in radiocarbon years before present (BP) */,
  "age_error" INTEGER /* Error margin for the age (years) */,
  "age_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of age determination method */,
  "material_dated_id" INTEGER /* Type of material dated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "layer_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of layer (e.g., sedimentary, igneous) */,
  "layer_age_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in layer age (years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_layer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_type_id") REFERENCES layer_types ("layer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES core_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer_types" (
  "layer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer type */,
  "layer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core sample analyzed */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Instrument used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_analyses_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES analysis_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_analyses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES core_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core sample the publication is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES core_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the citation is for */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the core sample requested */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_requests_request_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_status_id") REFERENCES request_status ("request_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_requests_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES core_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_status" (
  "request_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request status */,
  "request_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the request status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the request status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_status_id")
)
